name: motivational-interviewing
description: Motivational interviewing for AI agents. Helps users work through ambivalence, stuckness, and decisions.

interface.shortDescription: Help working through ambivalence, stuckness, and decisions
interface.longDescription: Uses evidence-based motivational interviewing techniques to help users explore ambivalence, surface their own motivations, and find their own direction. Never tells the user what to do — reflects, asks open questions, and creates space for insight.
defaultPrompt: Help me work through something I'm stuck on
I don't know what to do about...
